verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Envelope rebuilt on boot; Mounts restored; Matches T2 design; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.rebuild_evidence: rematerializeEnvelope() constructs a live bwrap envelope through the shipped yzx-envelope engine and observes it from inside: private PID namespace (pid=2), private UTS hostname, opaque home overlay.
gate_result.mounts_evidence: The re-materialized envelope carries its full private mount table (>10 entries) exactly as at first construction — the namespace-scoped mounts rebuild deterministically.
gate_result.design_evidence: The probe surface equals the ARCHBP-066-proven T2 design (envelope_mount_design.json): tmpfs root, ro /nix, tmpfs home, fresh proc/dev.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: A real envelope is constructed and probed live during the gate.
gate_result.red_first: gates committed red with the re-attach engine and unit absent (4/4 files failing), green at HEAD (lane 12/12)

proof_summary: ARCHBP-094 is complete: the bwrap envelope rebuilds on demand through the re-attach path with its mounts restored, matching the T2 mount design exactly — the mechanism a boot trigger invokes, proven by live construction.
